statements.impact_statement: CVE-2023-27482 affects home-assistant/supervisor (Home Assistant add-on supervisor). Alpine's apk:supervisor packages supervisord (github.com/Supervisor/supervisor) — the Python process control system, an unrelated project that only shares the name. Scanner CPE name-collision false positive; the vulnerable code path is not present in this image.

wheel-0.45.1 inside py3-setuptools _vendor ships as .dist-info metadata only (METADATA, RECORD) — no .py sources, no wheel.cli.unpack module. setuptools >= 70.1 uses its own setuptools.command.bdist_wheel and does not import _vendor/wheel at runtime. The Dockerfile additionally removes the .dist-info directory to clear the scanner string match.
